name_cn:
Genuine leather in stock!!️
Classic Lady latest Linglang buckle Diaper bag with sheepskin lining. A must-have three-compartment mini bag 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻. Crossbody or handheld for a feminine look. Classic and stylish. A beauty everyone has, don't miss out ❤️
size:17*7*15cm
